name: recompile_limit
description: Maximum number of recompilations before dynamo gives up on a frame (default: 8)

name: accumulated_recompile_limit
description: Safeguard to prevent horrible recompilations across all frames (default: 256)

name: capture_scalar_outputs
description: Capture scalar outputs (e.g., from .item()) in the graph instead of graph breaking (requires dynamic_shapes)

name: capture_dynamic_output_shape_ops
description: Capture ops with dynamic output shapes (nonzero, unique) instead of graph breaking

name: suppress_errors
description: Suppress errors in torch._dynamo.optimize and force fallback to eager (may lose optimization opportunities)

name: inline_inbuilt_nn_modules
description: Inline built-in nn modules for regional compilation (deprecated: always True, 27% compile time reduction)

name: verbose
description: Print full stack traces on warnings and errors for debugging

name: repro_level
description: Compiler debug info level: 1=dumps original graph on fail, 2=minifier launcher, 3=always minifier, 4=accuracy fails (default: 2)

name: repro_after
description: Run minifier at specific stage: None=off, 'dynamo'=TorchDynamo graphs, 'aot'=AOT Autograd graphs

name: TORCH_LOGS
description: Configure logging for dynamo, aot, inductor (e.g., TORCH_LOGS="dynamo,aot,inductor" or TORCH_LOGS="graph_breaks")

name: TORCH_COMPILE_DEBUG
description: Enable detailed inductor debug output and trace logging

name: specialize_int
description: Specialize on int inputs when dynamic_shapes is True (default: False, mostly for export)

name: specialize_float
description: Specialize on float inputs (default: False, backends inconsistently support float codegen)

name: assume_static_by_default
description: Only allocate symbols for shapes marked dynamic via mark_dynamic (default: True)

name: guard_nn_modules
description: Assume nn.Module contents are mutable and add guards (default: True, opposite of freezing)

name: optimize_ddp
description: Optimize DDP module: 'ddp_optimizer' (split graph for overlap), 'python_reducer', 'no_optimization' (default: ddp_optimizer)

name: allow_rnn
description: Disable graph breaking on RNN ops (YMMV with backends, default: False)

name: trace_numpy
description: Trace through NumPy operations instead of graph breaking (default: True)

name: enable_compiler_collectives
description: Use collectives during compilation to sync dynamic shape decisions across ranks (requires SPMD, prevents NCCL hangs)

name: TORCH_COMPILE_DYNAMIC_SOURCES
description: Specify dynamic inputs upfront (e.g., L['x'],L['y']) to reduce compile time, 'mandatory' for performance

name: max_autotune_gemm
description: Enable slow autotuning for GEMM operations only (default: False)

name: fallback_random
description: Fallback to eager for random/dropout ops (slow but useful for debugging, default: False)

name: force_disable_caches
description: Disable all caching mechanisms (fx_graph_cache, autotune_cache) for debugging

name: cpp_wrapper
description: Use C++ wrapper instead of Python wrapper for inductor (incompatible with disable_cpp_codegen)

name: fx_graph_cache
description: Use FX AOT graph codegen cache to speed up compilation (default: True)

name: emulate_precision_casts
description: Emulate precision casts in inductor to match eager mode numerics

name: dynamic
description: torch.compile flag to enable dynamic shapes (dynamic=True) or force static shapes (dynamic=False)

name: fullgraph
description: torch.compile flag to require no graph breaks (fullgraph=True) or allow them (fullgraph=False)

name: max_autotune
description: Try all kernel options including Triton templates for matmul/conv. May not help if 64-bit indexing not implemented for templates.

name: triton.cudagraphs
description: Enable/disable CUDA graph capture for Triton kernels (disable for GPU compatibility testing or debugging)

name: AOT_FX_GRAPHS
description: Environment variable to dump AOT Autograd's forward/backward graph decomposition for inspection
